qas.a: Contains all of the federal travel regulations and also includes allowances for foreign service personnel

Travel CONUS to CONUS reservations
qas.a: traveler makes reservation directly through the CTO and flys directly to destination

qas.q: Travel CONUS to OCNOUS reservations
qas.a: traveler makes reservation through CTO to POE then travel is arranged on CAT B or M for POE to POD

qas.q: Trace OCONUS to CONUS reservations
qas.a: Traveler makes AMC reservation from OCONUS POE to CONUS POD then Commercial air taken from CONUS POD to ultimate destination
